tagline: Take a vacation in your own backyard

hero.headline:
Your Backyard Oasis Starts
Right Here
hero.subheadline: For over 75 years, Staten Island families have trusted Holly Hill Pool & Patio for everything from pool sales and installation to expert water testing and repairs. We sell fun -- guaranteed.

services.label: What We Offer
services.headline: Everything for Your<br class="hidden md:block"> Ultimate Backyard
services.subtitle: From pools and patio structures to awnings and sheds, Holly Hill is your one-stop destination for creating the backyard you have always dreamed about.

cards.title: Pool Sales & Installation
cards.description: Premium Sharkline above-ground and EZ Panel in-ground pool systems. Free in-home estimates and expert guidance from selection to installation.

cards.title: Water Testing & Chemicals
cards.description: Free computerized water testing with step-by-step treatment plans. Full line of BioGuard chemicals to keep your water crystal clear all season.

cards.title: Repairs & Service
cards.description: Expert repair services for filters, motors, and automatic vacuums. Our experienced technicians diagnose and fix problems fast.

cards.title: Poolside Structures
cards.description: Beautiful Limerick, Cantania, and Breakaway poolside structures that enhance your outdoor living space with shade and comfort.

cards.title: Retractable Awnings
cards.description: Premium Aristocrat and Sunsetter retractable awnings that extend your outdoor living area with stylish, functional shade solutions.

cards.title: Storage Sheds
cards.description: Quality sheds in New England, Garden Cottage, and Traditional Vinyl styles, custom-built to fit your backyard and storage needs.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Backyard

steps.title: Visit Our Showroom
steps.description: Stop by our Staten Island showroom to browse pools, structures, awnings, and sheds. Our friendly staff will answer every question -- no pressure, just honest advice.

steps.title: Get Expert Guidance
steps.description: We will help you choose the perfect products for your space and budget. Free in-home estimates for pools and structures, free computerized water testing for existing pools.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard
steps.description: From professional installation to ongoing water care support, we are with you every step. Your backyard vacation starts now -- and we are always here when you need us.

about.label: Why Staten Island Trusts Us
about.headline: Three Generations of Backyard Expertise
about.description: Since 1951, Holly Hill Pool & Patio has been family owned and operated right here on Staten Island. Over 75 years and three generations, we have built our reputation on honest advice, expert knowledge, and treating every customer like a neighbor. We are not a big-box chain -- we are the local family that knows your water, your backyard, and your name.

features.title: 75+ Years Family Owned
features.description: Three generations of the same family serving Staten Island since 1951. That kind of commitment cannot be replicated.

features.title: Free Water Testing
features.description: Bring in a sample and get free computerized analysis with personalized treatment steps. No purchase required, no strings attached.

features.title: One-Stop Backyard Shop
features.description: Pools, structures, awnings, sheds, chemicals, repairs, and propane. Everything you need for your backyard in one trusted place.

pricing.headline: Fair Pricing From a Family You Can Trust.
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees, no surprise charges. Just honest pricing from a business that has earned Staten Island's trust for over 75 years.

guarantee.headline: Our "Good Neighbor" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any product or service, come talk to us. We have been on this island for 75 years because we stand behind everything we sell. We will make it right -- that is the Holly Hill way.

faqs.question: Do you install pools or just sell them?
faqs.answer: We sell premium Sharkline above-ground pools and EZ Panel in-ground systems, and we provide expert guidance for installation. We can recommend trusted local installers and are with you every step of the process from selection to your first swim.

faqs.question: Is the water testing really free?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Bring in a water sample any time and we will run a full computerized analysis. You will get a printed report with step-by-step instructions for treatment. No purchase necessary, no appointment needed.

faqs.question: What brands of chemicals do you carry?
faqs.answer: We are a BioGuard Platinum Dealer, which means we carry the full BioGuard line plus other trusted brands. Our staff can recommend the right products based on your specific water chemistry results.

faqs.question: Can you repair my pool equipment?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our in-house service center handles repairs for filters, motors, and automatic vacuums. Our technicians have decades of experience and can diagnose most issues quickly. Bring your equipment in or call for details.

faqs.question: Do you sell propane tanks?
faqs.answer: We offer convenient BBQ propane tank exchange at competitive prices. Just bring in your empty tank and swap it for a full one -- quick and easy so you are ready for your next cookout.

testimonials.name: Zoey
testimonials.text: They are truly amazing to deal with and very professional, making our pool experience easy and enjoyable. Could not recommend them enough.

testimonials.name: John B.
testimonials.text: Holly Hill surpasses all other pool stores in customer service. Very knowledgeable and friendly. They really know their stuff and never steer you wrong.

testimonials.name: Danielle
testimonials.text: The customer service at Holly Hill is unmatched. Every interaction has been pleasant. The staff is always helpful and never pushy -- just genuinely good people.

contact.subtitle: Stop by our Staten Island showroom or give us a call. Free estimates, free water testing, and 75 years of honest advice waiting for you.
